chapter_title.en: Chapter on What is Permissible and Impermissible to Wear in the State of Ihram

text: 2615 - وَ سَأَلَهُ رِفَاعَةُ بْنُ مُوسَى : عَنِ اَلْمُحْرِمِ يَلْبَسُ اَلْجَوْرَبَيْنِ فَقَالَ «نَعَمْ وَ اَلْخُفَّيْنِ إِذَا اُضْطُرَّ إِلَيْهِمَا ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2615 - Rifa’ah ibn Musa asked Imam (as) about a Muhrim wearing socks (jawrabayn).
Imam (as) said: "Yes, and also leather slippers (khuffayn) if he is compelled to wear them."
